examples: God welcomes the sinner who repents.
I was shown that I am a sinner, that I needed to repent of my sins.
God be merciful to me a sinner!
Naturally, nearly all of us fall into the sinner category, and therein lies an industry.
"There is an affection for a guy who admits he's a sinner and asks for forgiveness, especially down here, " Avlon said.
